description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel and a robust pump-action fore-end. The stock is a skeletonized, adjustable type with a pistol grip for enhanced control and ergonomics. Along the receiver, there is a visible rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and the left side of the receiver holds a shell carrier with several red and yellow shotgun shells. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban law enforcement or tactical scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical pump-action shotgun with a skeletonized adjustable stock, pistol grip, and side-mounted shell carrier. Features a long barrel and accessory rail for urban tactical use.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length, adjustable stock, pistol grip, and side shell carrier.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle, pump fore-end, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile showing the shell carrier and the uninterrupted length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: skeletonized adjustable stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
